---
listing:
  id: team
  contents:
    - "members"
  fields: [image, title, description]
  max-description-length: 100
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: "true"
fig-cap-location: bottom
format:
  html:
    css: ../html/styles.scss
---



:::{.column-body-outset}
<div class="container" style="width:100%">
  <img src="../img/IMG_6770_narrowcrop.jpg" alt="Avatar" class="imgstyle" style="width:100%">
  <div class="middle" style="color: #EBF8FA; font-weight: bold; background: #1C5F6B">
  &nbsp; Team in 2022 &nbsp;
  </div>
</div>
:::

## Team

::: {#team}
:::

## Alumni

**Jens Mayer**, MSc Student \
**Zeina Yasser**, Student Assistant \
**Alexander Schleiter**, Student Assistant \
**Harshit Jindal**, MSc Student Intern

## Field Trips
<div class="bodyimgstyle">
<div class="container" style="width:100%">
  <img src="../img/brussels_crop.jpg" alt="Avatar" class="imgstyle" style="width:100%">
  <div class="middle" style="color: #EBF8FA; font-weight: bold; background: #1C5F6B">
  &nbsp; EuroBioC 2023 Gent &nbsp;
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container" style="width:100%">
  <img src="../img/brussels_crop2.jpg" alt="Avatar" class="imgstyle" style="width:100%">
  <div class="middle" style="color: #EBF8FA; font-weight: bold; background: #1C5F6B">
  &nbsp; EuroBioC 2023 Gent &nbsp;
  </div>
</div>
</div>
